core_payload.content:
# Night Shift Autonomy

## 1. Role
Night Shift Autonomy is the mature unattended operating mode of N1Hub, shaping what the system may do while the human is offline and how that work must return for daylight review.

## 2. Shift Contract
This mode coordinates execution windows, day-vs-night behavior, budget discipline, cooldown posture, handoff rules, and mutation boundaries with much more explicit operator and wallet awareness. Night work remains bounded, reviewable, and preference-aware instead of merely aggressive.

## 3. Operational Consequence
The system can compound useful progress overnight while still producing clear morning return paths, safer mutation posture, and better protection against runaway cost or unreviewed structural change.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Night Shift Autonomy supports To Dig Deep by making unattended depth calmer, more legible, and more trustworthy.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Night Shift Autonomy defines the unattended operating mode that shapes what N1Hub may do while the human is offline and how that work must return for daylight review. It covers execution windows, day-versus-night behavior, budget discipline, cooldown posture, mutation boundaries, and operator and wallet awareness. The capsule matters because useful overnight progress becomes dangerous when autonomy is aggressive but poorly bounded. It makes unattended depth calmer, reviewable, and preference-aware so morning handoffs remain legible instead of surprising or structurally unsafe.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Removed meta-commentary leakage so the capsule states present unattended-runtime doctrine directly.
